title: Sunday Call to Mom
description: A short weekly call home — how's the week, the weather, what's for dinner.

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Hi sweetheart! How's your week been?

templates.text: Pretty busy, but I'm doing okay. How about you guys?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Same as always. Dad's in the garden, I'm cooking.

templates.text: What are you making? Anything good?

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Just chicken soup. Easy day in the kitchen.

templates.text: I miss your soup. The one I make never tastes the same.
templates.hint_zh: 好懷念你煮的湯,我自己做的味道不一樣。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Come visit and I'll teach you. The trick is taking your time.

templates.text: I'll plan a weekend soon. Tell Dad I said hi.
templates.hint_zh: 我安排個週末過去。跟爸說我問好。

turns.speaker: bot
turns.text: Will do. Take care, eat well!
